response.justification: While the candidate brings 19+ years of strong software engineering, staff-level technical leadership, and recent exposure to MCP and agentic workflows at re:cinq, they lack the required 8+ years of production AI/ML development that is core to this role. Critical gaps include no demonstrated experience with Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM systems optimization. The GenAI work started April 2025 (less than 2 months) and lacks evidence of shipping production AI solutions, building evaluation pipelines, or designing data pipelines for ML. Consider only if the recent role shows deeper AI system experience than stated.
strengths: 19+ years of production software engineering with proven staff-level technical leadership, mentoring, and ability to architect complex distributed systems
Strong TypeScript/Node.js expertise and demonstrated AWS cloud infrastructure experience (CDK, large-scale real-time systems) showing cloud platform competency
Recent exposure to MCP (Model Context Protocol) and agentic workflow frameworks aligns with emerging AI agent infrastructure stack
concerns: No production experience with AI/ML systems, LLMs, or generative AI solutions despite 8+ years being a hard requirement for the staff-level role
Missing Python (listed as primary language), vector databases, and RAG architecture experience—all required qualifications for this position
AI/agent infrastructure work began April 2025 with no demonstrated shipping of evaluation pipelines, data pipeline infrastructure, or LLM performance optimization

key_factors.factor: Staff-level engineering excellence and technical leadership
Recent MCP and agentic workflows exposure
